expectations.text: Uses past tense for completed actions
expectations.evidence: All verbs in past tense: was carried out, comprised, employed, was gathered, was performed

expectations.text: Uses passive voice appropriately for Methods section
expectations.evidence: Dominant passive voice: 'was carried out', 'was gathered', 'was performed utilizing'

expectations.text: Preserves methodological details (sample size, design, tools)
expectations.evidence: Preserves: 100 participants, randomized controlled trial, surveys, interviews, SPSS software

expectations.text: No more than 5 consecutive words match the original

expectations.evidence: Objective tone maintained with formal academic language
